summary: Sprint 4 Media Master — Broadcast Director streamer panel + global Break-In Banner. Both backend (live-input provisioning, tv/program, scout/ingest, break-ins/active, privacy guard) and frontend (BD page, 5-channel grid, duration chips, broadcast happy-path, break-in banner trigger/anti-spam/jump/dismiss) verified end-to-end. Regression Shield 371/371 GREEN. Smoke pass on all 7 major routes — no white-screens. App is BETA-REDEPLOY READY.

issues: BackButton labelled 'Back to dashboard' but BackButton component renders just 'Back' on the actual UI (cosmetic, not blocking).

action_items: OPTIONAL spec-vs-reality reconciliation: the review request said StreamerDashboard CTA is reachable at '/streamer-dashboard or /dashboard/streamer'. In the actual app StreamerDashboard is mounted at '/my-streams' and the CTA is present there (data-testid streamer-dashboard-broadcast-director-cta -> href /dashboard/streamer/broadcast-director). Consider adding a route alias /dashboard/streamer -> StreamerDashboard for nav clarity, or update PRD to reflect the real route.
critical_code_review_comments: BroadcastDirectorPage.tsx Promise.all does not parallelise the per-channel now-playing fetches inside init() until AFTER channels arrive — that is correct but each fetch is unauthenticated; if any channel ever requires auth the page will silently break. Currently fine because now-playing is public.

BreakInBanner polls every 30s and naturally throttles to trigger paths. On route change a new poll fires immediately — could spike network on rapid SPA navigation between /casino and /dating; minor, acceptable.

broadcast() in BroadcastDirectorPage swallows non-200 responses into a generic toast — fine for v1, but the 4h duration_hours param is ignored if duration state is something else. Not a bug here, just an FYI that duration is sent to backend correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (BD page loads, all 5 channels + 5 duration buttons present, broadcast happy-path returns success message, CTA from StreamerDashboard works, break-in banner trigger/dismiss/jump verified, banner correctly suppressed on /profile /wallet /dashboard /admin, no white-screen on /casino /dating /games /media-master /dashboard /casino/high-roller /admin/media-master-pulse)

seed_data_creation: POST /api/media-master/scout/ingest fired a hype=15750 break-in for room_id 'sprint4_break_test' to drive the banner; alert auto-expires in 2 min so no manual cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 4 of Media Master is GREEN. Broadcast Director lives at /dashboard/streamer/broadcast-director with testids broadcast-director-page, broadcast-director-input-status, broadcast-director-channel-<id> (arena/spotlight-lounge/dsg-radio-tv/after-dark/nightmare-club), broadcast-director-duration-{1,2,4,8,24}, broadcast-director-broadcast-btn, broadcast-director-message-ok/-err. Break-in banner is mounted in App.js, polls /api/media-master/scout/break-ins/active only when location.pathname startsWith one of /casino /dating /games /media-master, testids break-in-banner / break-in-banner-jump / break-in-banner-dismiss. StreamerDashboard is at /my-streams (NOT /streamer-dashboard) — CTA tile testid streamer-dashboard-broadcast-director-cta navigates to /dashboard/streamer/broadcast-director. Backend confirmed: POST live-inputs returns mode='live' against real Cloudflare here; POST tv/program returns 200 with program.programmed_until 4h ahead; GET now-playing returns live:false when is_live=false (privacy guard intact). Regression Shield: 371 passed in 6.28s.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
